name: Agent
purpose: Spawn a subagent with its own context window (forks, agent-team teammates)
note: Formerly the Task tool (CHANGELOG language switch ~2.1.7x); the removed TeamCreate/TeamDelete (v2.1.178) are replaced by spawning teammates via the Agent name parameter; the resume parameter was removed v2.1.77 in favour of SendMessage({to})

name: Artifact
purpose: Publish HTML/MD as a private claude.ai page

name: AskUserQuestion
purpose: Multiple-choice question back to the user

name: Bash
purpose: Run shell commands

name: CronCreate
purpose: Schedule session-internal recurring/one-off prompts

name: CronDelete
purpose: Delete a scheduled task by id

name: CronList
purpose: List the session's scheduled tasks

name: Edit
purpose: Targeted file edits (exact string replacement)

name: EnterPlanMode
purpose: Switch into plan mode

name: EnterWorktree
purpose: Create/enter an isolated git worktree

name: ExitPlanMode
purpose: Present the plan for approval and leave plan mode

name: ExitWorktree
purpose: Leave the worktree session

name: Glob
purpose: Find files by pattern

name: Grep
purpose: Search file contents (ripgrep)

name: ListMcpResourcesTool
purpose: List resources of connected MCP servers

name: LSP
purpose: Code intelligence via a language server (definitions, references, type errors)

name: Monitor
purpose: Watch a background command/WebSocket and forward events to Claude
note: stable from v2.1.98; not on Bedrock/GCP/Foundry; off under DISABLE_TELEMETRY

name: NotebookEdit
purpose: Edit Jupyter notebook cells

name: PowerShell
purpose: Run PowerShell commands natively

name: PushNotification
purpose: Desktop/phone push (remote control)

name: Read
purpose: Read files (also images/PDF/ipynb)

name: ReadMcpResourceTool
purpose: Read a single MCP resource by URI

name: RemoteTrigger
purpose: Create/start routines on claude.ai (backs /schedule)

name: ReportFindings
purpose: Report code-review findings in a structured form

name: ScheduleWakeup
purpose: Schedule the next iteration of a self-paced /loop
note: stop from v2.1.202; not on Bedrock/GCP/Foundry

name: SendMessage
purpose: Message an agent-team teammate / resume a subagent
note: semantics changed v2.1.198/199; sole resume path since v2.1.77

name: SendUserFile
purpose: Send files to the user device (remote control/cloud)

name: ShareOnboardingGuide
purpose: Upload ONBOARDING.md and produce a share link

name: Skill
purpose: Run a skill in the main conversation
note: skills add no new tool entries — they run through this one tool

name: TaskCreate
purpose: Create a task in the task list

name: TaskGet
purpose: Read the details of a task

name: TaskList
purpose: List all tasks with their status

name: TaskOutput
purpose: Fetch the output of a background task
note: deprecated in favour of Read on the output-file path since v2.1.83

name: TaskStop
purpose: Stop a background task/teammate by id

name: TaskUpdate
purpose: Change task status/dependencies, delete tasks

name: TodoWrite
purpose: Session checklist (legacy)
note: default-disabled since v2.1.142 in favour of Task-CRUD (CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TASKS=0 reactivates it)

name: ToolSearch
purpose: Search + load deferred tools (when tool search is on)
note: conditional — only present with tool search enabled

name: WaitForMcpServers
purpose: Wait for still-connecting MCP servers
note: conditional — only WITHOUT tool search (otherwise ToolSearch takes over)

name: WebFetch
purpose: Fetch a URL, convert to markdown, extract via a small model (lossy by design)

name: WebSearch
purpose: Web search (titles + URLs, fetches no pages)

name: Workflow
purpose: Dynamic workflow: a script orchestrates many subagents

name: Write
purpose: Create/overwrite a file
